options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: EndGoal
options.description:
Determine the goal for the seed

Minikits: Collect Minikits to win.
Levels Beaten: Beat Levels to win.

options.name: minikit_sanity
options.description: Puts all 300 Minikits into the pool.

options.name: minikits_to_win
options.description: Number of Minikits needed to win. Only applicable if win con is set to Minikits Collected.

options.name: levels_to_win
options.description: Number of Levels Beaten needed to win. Only applicable if win con is set to Levels Beaten.

options.name: true_status_sanity
options.description: Shuffles the true status of each level.

options.name: freeplay_or_story
options.display_name: Unlock Story or Story and Freeplay
options.description:
Determines if the level unlocked item gives you Story Mode or Story Mode & Freeplay.
If turned off, Freeplay is unlocked by completing Story Mode.
